description: Google Cloud Translation is a managed machine-translation service for translating text and documents between languages. It is part of Google Cloud and offers basic and advanced editions with features such as glossary and custom/adaptive translation.
summary: translation.googleapis.com exposes Google Cloud Translation REST APIs on v2 and v3; v2 accepts either an API key or OAuth 2.0 bearer token, while v3 uses Google Cloud OAuth-based credentials. Google also documents a gcloud beta CLI command for translation workflows.
